selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 雪, 积雪, 下雪, 雪花形干扰；vi. 下雪, 似雪般落下
words.definition: n. precipitation falling from clouds in the form of ice crystals

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. a member of the Caucasoid race

words.translation: n. 冬季, 萧条期, 衰退期；a. 冬天的
words.definition: n. the coldest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the winter solstice to the vernal equinox

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 叔父, 伯父, 姨丈
words.definition: n. the brother of your father or mother; the husband of your aunt

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 光, 光亮, 灯, 日光, 发光体, 光源, 杰出人物, 火花, 眼光；a. 轻的, 少量的, 轻微的, 轻快的, 轻浮的, 明亮的, 淡色的, 容易的
words.definition: n. (physics) electromagnetic radiation that can produce a visual sensation

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: n. 死亡
words.definition: n. the event of dying or departure from life

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: n. 山, 山脉, 大堆
words.definition: n. a land mass that projects well above its surroundings; higher than a hill

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的
words.definition: n. the season of growth

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: a. 近的, 近亲的, 近似的；adv. 接近, 亲近
words.definition: a. not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: a. 平滑的, 平稳的, 流畅的, 和蔼的, 安祥的, 圆滑的, 调匀的, 无毛的；vt. 使光滑, 烫平, 使平和, 消除
words.definition: n. the act of smoothing

words.translation: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 贿赂；vt. 使结冰, 冰镇, 覆以糖衣
words.definition: n. water frozen in the solid state

words.translation: n. 景观, 视力, 眼界, 阅读, 见解, 意见；vt. 看见, 瞄准
words.definition: n. an instance of visual perception

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 人, 人类；a. 人类的, 似人类的, 人性的, 有同情心的
words.definition: a. characteristic of humanity

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕
words.definition: n. a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世
words.definition: n. the act of traveling by foot

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
words.definition: n. any immature animal

words.translation: n. 云, 阴暗, 烟雾, 疑团；vt. 以云遮敝, 笼罩, 使黯然
words.definition: n. any collection of particles (e.g., smoke or dust) or gases that is visible

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 引导者, 导游, 指南, 路标；vt. 指导, 支配, 管理, 带领, 操纵
words.definition: n. someone who shows the way by leading or advising

words.translation: adv. 如此, 因此, 到如此程度
words.definition: r. in the way indicated; (`thusly' is a nonstandard variant)

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: n. the central and most intense or profound part

words.translation: a. 极大的, 巨大的, 无限的
words.definition: s. unusually great in size or amount or degree or especially extent or scope

words.translation: n. 盥洗室, 厕所, 嫖客
words.definition: n. youngest son of Henry II; King of England from 1199 to 1216; succeeded to the throne on the death of his brother Richard I; lost his French possessions; in 1

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: n. 触觉, 碰, 触, 机灵, 轻触, 格调, 少许, 缺点, 弹力；vt. 接触, 触摸, 触及, 使接触, 达到, 涉及, 影响到, 使轻度受害, 感动

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地
words.definition: n. the state of being free of suspicion

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展
words.definition: v. become larger, greater, or bigger; expand or gain

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 停留, 逗留, 制止, 延缓, 停止, 支柱, 支撑物, 支索；vt. 制止, 延缓, 坚持, 支持, 支撑, 用支索固定
words.definition: n. continuing or remaining in a place or state

words.translation: prep. 在...下方；adv. 在...下方

words.translation: n. 呼吸, 气息, 瞬间

words.translation: n. 门厅, 走廊, 会堂

words.translation: n. 叶, 树叶, 花瓣, 页；vi. 生叶, 翻书页

words.translation: n. 路径, 小路, 道路, 途径, 路线, 轨道
words.definition: n. a way especially designed for a particular use

words.translation: a. 愉快的, 可爱的, 活泼的, 亲切的

words.translation: a. 宽广的, 辽阔的, 广大的, 显著的；adv. 宽阔地
words.definition: n. slang term for a woman

words.translation: n. 污点, 地点, 斑点, 点, 娱乐场所, 处境, 少量；a. 当场的, 现场的, 现货买卖的, 现金交易的, 抽样的

words.translation: prep. 超过, 在那一边, 迟于；adv. 在远处

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者

words.translation: vt. 进入, 参加, 开始, 输入, 回车；vi. 进去, 参加

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地

words.translation: n. 领域, 田地, 场地, 战场, 场, 域；vt. 使...晒在场上, 使上场

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇

words.translation: n. 休息, 睡眠, 安息, 稍息, 静止, 支架, 休息处, 其余者, 剩余部分；vi. 休息, 睡, 长眠, 安心, 静止, 停止, 安置, 依赖

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
